docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT MESINA, PHILIP DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
